name: Carta Cap Table & Equity API
what_it_does: Carta's equity management platform API for managing cap tables, equity grants, option exercises, 409A valuations, and investor reporting. Enables programmatic access to company ownership data, employee equity schedules, and fundraising round data.
use_cases: Reading cap table data and ownership percentages for reporting agents
Retrieving equity grant details and vesting schedules for HR automation agents
Accessing 409A valuation data for financial planning agents
Querying investor and shareholder information for fundraising agents
not_for: Public company equity (Carta is focused on private company cap tables)
Real-time trading or secondary market transactions
best_when: A startup or VC-backed company using Carta wants AI agents to query cap table data, equity positions, and investor information for reporting and financial planning.
avoid_when: You need to modify equity records — cap table changes require human legal oversight. FINANCIAL RISK: Equity data is highly sensitive legal and financial information.

auth.notes: Carta OAuth 2.0. API access is limited — Carta controls developer access. Contact Carta for API credentials. Read-only scopes preferred for agents.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Carta subscription required; API access not publicly available
pricing.paid_tiers: Carta pricing varies by company stage and feature set
pricing.notes: Carta API access is controlled and requires approval. Contact Carta for developer access.

performance.rate_limits: Carta API rate limits not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Cap table data is highly sensitive legal and financial information
Carta API access is controlled — not publicly available, requires approval
No public MCP server available — agents must use REST API directly
Equity modifications require human legal and financial oversight
Cap table data includes personal ownership information — strict access controls required
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Cap table and equity ownership data is sensitive legal information. SOC2 certified. OAuth required. Write operations require human oversight.

security_score_components.security_notes: Highly sensitive equity and ownership data. OAuth required. SOC2 certified. FINANCIAL RISK for autonomous modifications.
